## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Verification

- [ ] Python validation passes
- [ ] Swift tests pass when iOS code changed
- [ ] Visual proof was reviewed when UI changed
- [ ] Permissions match implemented behavior
- [ ] No secrets, signing files, build output, logs, or personal data are included
- [ ] Public API and non-jailbreak boundaries are preserved

## Device Testing

State the tested device, iOS version, and any behavior that remains simulator-only or unverified.
